fields.name: Safety Status
fields.formula: if(field('Deviation') > field('Tolerance Limit'), '🔴 CRITICAL: HALT MACHINE', '🟢 SAFE')

fields.name: Next Calibration Due
fields.formula: field('Last Calibration Date') + multiply(date_interval('1 day'), field('Calibration Interval (Days)'))

fields.name: Compliance Status
fields.formula: if(today() > field('Next Calibration Due'), '⚠️ Overdue', '✅  Compliant')

views.name: New Equipment Intake
views.title: New Equipment Intake
views.description: Add new equipment to the fleet.

views.name: Staff Onboarding
views.title: Join the Team
views.description: Certifications and contact information for inspectors.

text.formula:
concat('🚨 CRITICAL SAFETY ALERT: ','
',concat(get('previous_node.393.field_9181'),' at ',get('previous_node.393.field_9183.value'),' failed calibrations. Result:'),'
',concat(get('previous_node.391.0.field_9172'),' vs Target: ',get('previous_node.391.0.field_9171')),'
','Machine has been locked automatically')
